case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DELORES KING et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, DELORES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 570 FRANCISCO STREET #703, SAN FRANCISCO $1,142.54 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,142.54, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KING, DELORES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KING, DELORES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KING, DELORES DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, DELORES
